Inquiries About Procurement Activities

This page is for inquiries concerning Procurement Activities.Please read the following notes before making an inquiry.

Propose Your Product (Japanese Only)

Your product proposal to Toshiba's Procurement Division will be accepted here.

Inquiry Form

  • Click here to fill out the form Click here to fill out the form

Address

Address

Process Transformation Div. Procurement Control & Compliance Promoting Dept., TOSHIBA CORPORATION
1-1, Shibaura 1-chome, Minato-ku, Tokyo 105-8001, Japan

Before making an inquiry, please read the following.

By sending your personal data, you are consenting to the following.

●We use your personal data to Use of your personal data for the purpose of responding to your inquiries.
●Our group companies or third party contractors may use your personal data to the extent necessary to respond to your inquiry.
●You can request us at any time to disclose, correct or delete any personal data on you that we have retained. Please contact us from this inquiry form(Japanese Only).
●You can choose not to disclose your personal data, but doing so may prevent us from responding to your inquiry.
●Please look at Toshiba Corporation's Privacy Policy.
●Children under 16 years old are requested to make an inquiry only after receiving the consent of a parent or guardian.
●Inquiries sent on Saturdays, Sundays, or during company holidays, will be received on the earliest working day and dealt with as soon as possible.
